site_description: A community-run portal for the Municipality of Indang

hero.title: Welcome to BetterGov.ph
hero.subtitle: A community-run portal to find information and services of the Municipality of Indang, Cavite.

services.title: Services & Information
services.description: Access official government services quickly and easily. Find what you need for citizenship, business, education, and more.

governmentActivity.title: Government Activity
governmentActivity.description: Stay updated with the latest government activities and announcements.

history.title: History of Indang
history.charteredDesc: Indang was established as a municipality, rooted in a rich history of faith, agriculture, and community.
history.elevationDesc: Situated in the highlands of Cavite, Indang enjoys a cool and fertile environment ideal for agriculture.

precolonial.title: Early Settlements
precolonial.text: The area now known as Indang was home to early Tagalog communities engaged in farming and trade along the fertile lowlands of Cavite.

spanish.title: Spanish Colonization
spanish.text: Under Spanish rule, Indang was organized as a parish community. The local church, dedicated to Saint Gregory the Great, became the center of community life.

revolution.title: Philippine Revolution
revolution.text: Indang played a role in the Philippine Revolution, with local residents supporting the Katipunan's fight for independence from Spanish colonial rule.

american.title: Municipal Charter
american.text: Under American governance, Indang was formally established as a municipality with its own local government structure and civic institutions.

cavsu.title: Agricultural College Founded
cavsu.text: The Cavite State University (CavSU) main campus was established in Indang, anchoring the municipality as a center of agricultural education in the province.

republic.title: Republic Era
republic.text: After Philippine independence, Indang continued to grow as an agricultural and educational hub within the province of Cavite.

present.title: Modern Indang
present.text: Today, Indang is known for its thriving agriculture, strong educational institutions, and a close-knit community committed to progress and sustainable development.
